entry.name: AVIATE_ESTIMATE_QUALITY_UNUSABLE
entry.description: The estimate must not be used for control or navigation.

entry.name: AVIATE_ESTIMATE_QUALITY_DEGRADED
entry.description: The valid dimensions remain usable with degraded quality.

entry.name: AVIATE_ESTIMATE_QUALITY_GOOD
entry.description: The valid dimensions meet nominal quality criteria.

entry.name: AVIATE_STATE_VALID_POSITION
entry.description: The local NED position estimate is valid.

entry.name: AVIATE_STATE_VALID_VELOCITY
entry.description: The local NED velocity estimate is valid.

message.name: AVIATE_ESTIMATOR_STATUS
message.description: Lossless Aviate estimator quality and per-dimension validity. WIP: this is a private-dialect message and not a stable ABI; the layout may change until Aviate declares it stable, and a dedicated message-id range must be requested upstream before the dialect is published. The conservative standard projection is carried by ESTIMATOR_STATUS, not duplicated here.
